basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Assistant (UX) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitg.ac.in/. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Assistant (UX) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc /BCom / 3yr Dip in engg, currently pursuing MDes (Strategic Design, UX or similar field)
qualification.details: BSc /BCom / 3yr Dip in engg, currently pursuing MDes (Strategic Design, UX or similar field)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Project Assistant (UX) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Guwahati Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Project Assistant (UX) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Project Assistant (UX) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Project Assistant (UX) positions at IIT Guwahati is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant (UX) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Assistant (UX) position in the IIT Guwahati recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a BSc /BCom / 3yr Dip in engineering, or be currently pursuing an MDes in Strategic Design, UX, or a similar field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant (UX) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant (UX) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 23,600 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant (UX) position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant (UX) role will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant (UX) positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for this job?
faq.answer: The notification is for IIT Guwahati, Assam. Candidates from all states are generally eligible to apply for government jobs unless specific state domicile requirements are mentioned.

faq.question: Q10. How can I get the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
